'''vadhaga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ola|ola]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-dh-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ola|ola]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| vadhaga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vædhægæth|vædhægæth]] || [[word:vædhægæj|vædhægæj]] || [[word:vædhægæsh|vædhægæsh]] || [[word:vædhægæ|vædhægæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vadhadhagath|vadhadhagath]] || [[word:vadhadhagaj|vadhadhagaj]] || [[word:vadhadhagash|vadhadhagash]] || [[word:vadhadhaga|vadhadhaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vadhagath|vadhagath]] || [[word:vadhagaj|vadhagaj]] || [[word:vadhagash|vadhagash]] || [[word:vadhaga|vadhaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vadhafgath|vadhafgath]] || [[word:vadhafgaj|vadhafgaj]] || [[word:vadhafgash|vadhafgash]] || [[word:vadhafgaf|vadhafgaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vadhagatha|vadhagatha]] || [[word:vadhagaja|vadhagaja]] || [[word:vadhagasha|vadhagasha]] || [[word:vadhagaka|vadhagaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vadhagath|vadhagath]] || [[word:vadhagaj|vadhagaj]] || [[word:vadhagash|vadhagash]] || [[word:vadhaga|vadhaga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vadhagathal|vadhagathal]] || [[word:vadhagajal|vadhagajal]] || [[word:vadhagashal|vadhagashal]] || [[word:vadhagakal|vadhagakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vadhagathatha|vadhagathatha]] || [[word:vadhagajaja|vadhagajaja]] || [[word:vadhagashasha|vadhagashasha]] || [[word:vadhagaka|vadhagaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vadhagathan|vadhagathan]] || [[word:vadhagajan|vadhagajan]] || [[word:vadhagashan|vadhagashan]] || [[word:vadhagakan|vadhagakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vadhagathaoro|vadhagathaoro]] || [[word:vadhagajaoro|vadhagajaoro]] || [[word:vadhagashaoro|vadhagashaoro]] || [[word:vadhagakaoro|vadhagakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
